  "findings": [
    "Smoke detector spacing and placement cannot be fully verified without specific ceiling heights, partition layouts, and HVAC register locations."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cross-reference the physical rough-in locations of the smoke detectors with the approved fire alarm shop drawings, ceiling heights, and mechanical (HVAC) plans prior to close-out."
  ],
  "rationale": "While the physical rough-in of the boxes and cabling is complete, compliance with NFPA 72 spacing rules (such as the 30-foot rule, distance from joists/beams, and minimum 3-foot clearance from supply air diffusers) requires comparing the physical layout against the architectural, mechanical, and approved fire alarm submittal drawings.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 72 Chapter 17"
  ]
}
